subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O God, and praised be Thou! Sacred are Thy names and sanctified are Thy attributes! Exalted and manifest art Thou beyond comprehension [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم و بحمدک تقدست اسمائک و تنزهت صفاتک تعالیت و تجلیت عن ادراک
subcodes.subjects: @power of the Manifestation of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @Manifestation of God as mediator, @prayer for protection, @absolute freedom; independence of God
